description: A designed text/quote card (page 2, the continuation of the same DHS joint-statement set) on a solid DHS-blue background with red horizontal rules and the blue-and-white circular quotation-mark icon in the upper-left corner. The white body text continues the statement: it acknowledges concern among many communities and reiterates support to state and local authorities with advanced detection technology and law enforcement; urges Congress to enact counter-UAS legislation when it reconvenes to extend and expand existing counter-drone authorities to identify and mitigate any threat that may emerge; and notes a limited number of visual sightings of drones over military facilities in New Jersey and elsewhere, including within restricted airspace, stating such sightings near or over DoD installations are not new, that DoD takes unauthorized access seriously and coordinates with federal/state/local law enforcement, and that local commanders are actively engaged to ensure appropriate detection and mitigation. The statement closes with '###'. The DHS circular seal appears at the bottom right. This is a branded designed quote card rather than a candid photo; its function is official government messaging to the public/press regarding the drone-sighting response.
notable_text: We urge Congress to enact counter-UAS legislation; 'Such sightings near or over DoD installations are not new'; ###
